_audit_case: CASE_5: Missing layout fields to test defaults, no REF/ENCL
subj: AUDIT TEST: Missing Layout Fields (Should Default to single_column)
body: 1. This is an audit test payload with missing distribution_layout and copy_to_layout.
a. Both should default to single_column per model normalization.
b. No warnings should appear for missing fields.
c. No REF or ENCL blocks; body moves up naturally.
